_publications._publicationTitle: Genetic modifiers of neurofibromatosis type 1-associated café-au-lait macule count identified using multi-platform analysis.

_contextSnippet: SNP rs7161 is reported to locate to an enhancer region with weak H3K4me1 and strong H3K27ac marks in penile foreskin melanocytes using the HaploReg tool...However, we found no evidence for this enhancer region using Roadmap ChromHMM Primary Core Marks
details: Reported SNP rs7161 to locate to an enhancer region with weak H3K4me1 and strong H3K27ac marks in penile foreskin melanocytes, though this was not confirmed by Roadmap ChromHMM data
